project.name: Machine Telemetry Subsystem
project.description:
The machine telemetry subsystem samples coffee machine sensors and reports signed
telemetry to the fleet. It is a leaf system of the connected coffee fleet, hosted on
the coffee machine controller.

trustZones.name: System Boundary
trustZones.description: Default trust zone for components without explicit boundary mapping.

components.name: Telemetry Reporting
components.description: Encodes, signs, and reports telemetry to the fleet ingestion endpoint.

components.name: Telemetry Sampling
components.description: Samples machine sensors at the configured cadence.
